rows.title: Set OLLAMA_API_BASE:
rows.excerpt: Set OLLAMA_API_BASE: Set the OLLAMA_API_BASE variable: Ollama uses a local server, so you need to tell Aider where to find it: macOS/Linux: export OLLAMA_API_BASE=&quothttp://127.0.0.1:11434&quot Start Aider with Ollama: Use the ollama/ prefix when specifying the model: aider --model ollama/llama3.2:3b-instruct-fp16
